creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
The new port mail/squirrelmail-forget_password-plugin has a broken
		first field in /usr/ports/INDEX(-6) i.e.
		squirrelmail-password_forget-plugin-password_forget-plugin-2.1
		Note the duplication of -password_forget-plugin. The port installation directory is correct.

How-To-Repeat: grep password_forget /usr/ports/INDEX-6
